title: senecio pinnatifolius var. pinnatifolius
intro: Senecio pinnatifolius var. pinnatifolius, also known as the Ragwort or Greater Plantain, is a plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio pinnatifolius var. pinnatifolius include relief from bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its potential use as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical or internal use, although caution is advised due to potential toxicity in large doses.
